title: Sesi DB Helper
description: A lightweight, zero-dependency flat-file JSON database utility for persistent stateful storage in Sesi.
summary: This module provides a comprehensive suite of CRUD operations for managing local JSON-based data collections. It includes features for record insertion with auto-generated IDs, advanced filtering with AND logic, pagination, and sorting. Additionally, it supports collection management, bulk deletion, and built-in backup/restore functionality to ensure data integrity. The database is stored as a single flat file, making it ideal for simple, local-first applications.

code_examples.description: Initialize the database and insert a new record into a collection.
Retrieve paginated records from a collection with a filter.

key_rules: The database must be initialized via init_db or read_db before performing operations to ensure the file structure exists.
Records are automatically assigned a unique 'id' field upon insertion using a combination of time and random values.
All write operations (insert, update, delete) trigger a full file rewrite, which may impact performance on very large datasets.
The module relies on standard JSON parsing and file system access, requiring appropriate read/write permissions for the target path.
